member.name: T:BarbezDotEu.Generic.LinqHelper
M:BarbezDotEu.Generic.LinqHelper.PickRandom``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: From a given , selects a random single item.
member.typeparam: The type to pick one of.
member.param: The source collection to pick one item out of.
member.returns: One item, randomly chosen from the given collection.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.Generic.LinqHelper.PickRandom``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Picks an n number of items randomly from the . If n is larger than the number of items in the list, returns all items in the list only (which in this case is less than the number of items given to return).
member.param: The number of items to take.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.Generic.LinqHelper.Shuffle``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Randomly shuffles the given source collection.
member.typeparam: The types to be found in the collection to shuffle.
member.returns: A shuffled version of the given collection.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.Generic.LinqHelper.GenerateRandomList``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates n number of items randomly from a given source, even if the source list has less items than the number of items to return (as provided by the numberOfThings).
member.param: The number of items to take.

member.name: T:BarbezDotEu.Generic.ReflectionHelper
member.summary: Generic helper extension method adapted for Reflection from https://stackoverflow.com/a/1954663, amongst others.

member.name: M:BarbezDotEu.Generic.ReflectionHelper.GetPropertyValue``1(System.Object,System.String)
